SSB Constable Vacancy 2026 Details

The SSB Constable Tradesman & Driver Recruitment 2026 notification announces a total of 827 vacancies across different Constable posts.

Vacancies are notified for UR, EWS, OBC, SC and ST categories, and 10% of the total vacancies are reserved for Ex-Servicemen, which will be filled by non-Ex-Servicemen if suitable Ex-Servicemen candidates are not available.

The Director General, SSB reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of vacancies, fill or not to fill any vacancy and cancel the advertisement without assigning any reason.

Important Dates

  • Publication of SSB Constable Tradesman & Driver notification in Employment News: 21–27 March 2026.
  • Last date to submit online application: 30 days from the date of publication in Employment News (exact closing date to be notified on SSB website).

SSB Constable Eligibility Criteria 2026

SSB Constable Tradesman & Driver eligibility criteria include nationality, age limit, educational qualification, trade experience and medical/physical standards, and all conditions must be fulfilled as on the closing date of application.

Nationality

  • For Constables (Washerman, Barber, Water Carrier, Waiter, Tailor, Gardener, Cobbler): The candidate must be a citizen of India.
  • For Constables (Driver, Veterinary, Carpenter, Nursing Orderly): Only Indian citizens will normally be appointed, but subjects of Nepal or Bhutan are not debarred subject to Central Government permission.

Age Limit

The crucial date for determining age and all eligibility criteria is the last date for receipt of online applications, i.e. 30 days from the date of publication in Employment News.

  • Constable (Veterinary): 18 to 27 years
  • Constable (Driver) – Male: 18 to 27 years
  • Constable (Gardener, Water Carrier, Cobbler, Tailor, Washerman, Barber, Waiter): 18 to 23 years
  • Constable (Carpenter): 18 to 25 years
  • Constable (Nursing Orderly): 18 to 27 years

Age Relaxation

  • SC/ST: 5 years
  • OBC: 3 years
  • Ex-Servicemen: 3 years after deduction of military service rendered from actual age.
  • Departmental candidates (Central Government employees) and special categories such as J&K/Ladakh domiciles and dependents of 1984 riot victims get relaxation as per notified limits.

SSB Constable Educational Qualification 2026

Educational and professional qualifications for SSB Constable Tradesman & Driver Recruitment 2026 are post-specific and must be from recognised boards/ITI/Institutes.

  • Constable (Veterinary): 10th pass with Science as main subject from a recognised board and 1 year experience in treatment of different species of animals in a recognised veterinary hospital.
  • Constable (Driver) – Male: 10th pass from a recognised board and must possess a valid Heavy Vehicle Driving Licence.
  • Constables (Gardener, Water Carrier, Cobbler, Tailor, Washerman, Barber, Waiter): Matriculation or equivalent plus either 2 years work experience in the respective trade, or 1 year certificate course from recognised ITI/Vocational institute with at least 1 year experience, or 2 years diploma from recognised ITI in the trade or similar trade; must qualify trade test; multi-skilled candidates will be given preference.
  • Constable (Carpenter): Matriculation or equivalent and either 2 years work experience in the trade, or 1 year ITI/Vocational certificate with 1 year experience, or 2 years ITI diploma in the trade; must qualify trade test.
  • Constable (Nursing Orderly): 10th pass, First Aid certificate from St. John’s Ambulance Organisation or Red Cross Society of India, and minimum 1 year working experience as Nursing Orderly in a 50-bedded hospital/institution recognised by Central/State Government.

Candidates who are appearing in examination/awaiting results or not in possession of educational/professional certificates on the last date of application need not apply.

SSB Constable Selection Process 2026

The SSB Constable Tradesman & Driver Selection Process 2026 comprises multiple stages, and only those candidates who qualify each stage as per SSB norms will be considered for final appointment.

  • Physical Efficiency Test (PET): For Constables (Veterinary, Driver, Gardener, Water Carrier, Cobbler, Tailor, Washerman, Barber, Waiter, Carpenter & Nursing Orderly), PET consists of 4.8 km race in 24 minutes for male candidates and 2.4 km race in 18 minutes for female candidates; Ex-Servicemen are exempted from PET but must attend other stages.
  • Physical Standard Test (PST): Candidates who qualify PET will undergo PST where height and chest (for male candidates) are measured as per category and region-wise standards; those not meeting minimum standards are rejected.
  • Written Examination: Objective-type written test as per SSB pattern for Constable posts (detailed scheme to be provided on official website/notification).
  • Trade/Skill Test: Practical trade test for Tradesman posts and driving/maintenance test for Driver post to assess hands-on skills.
  • Documentation & Medical Examination: Verification of original documents, certificates, category proofs followed by medical examination as per SSB medical standards.

SSB Constable Exam Pattern 2026

The SSB Constable written exam pattern 2026 for Tradesman, Driver and other posts will generally include questions from General Knowledge, Elementary Mathematics, Reasoning and Trade-related subjects as per SSB guidelines.

Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed exam scheme and syllabus published on the official SSB website and in the detailed recruitment notification before starting preparation.

SSB Constable Salary 2026

All SSB Constable Tradesman, Driver, Veterinary, Carpenter and Nursing Orderly posts are placed in Pay Level-3 (₹21,700–69,100) of the 7th Central Pay Commission.

In addition to basic pay, Constables are entitled to Dearness Allowance, Ration Money Allowance, House Rent Allowance and other admissible allowances, and will be covered under Defined Contributory Pension Scheme or Unified Pension Scheme as applicable for new central government entrants.

SSB Constable Application Fee 2026

  • UR, EWS and OBC category candidates will require to pay examination fee amounting to Rs. 100/- (Rupees one hundred) only (Non Refundable) through netbanking/credit card/debit card/UPI. However, SC, ST, Ex-Serviceman and female candidates are exempted from payment of examination fees.
  • The exact SSB Constable application fee 2026, payment mode and category-wise exemptions will be notified in the detailed online application instructions.
  • Applications submitted without successful online fee payment (where applicable) will be rejected, so candidates must carefully follow the payment steps on the SSB recruitment portal.

How to Apply for SSB Constable Tradesman & Driver Recruitment 2026

Eligible candidates can apply online for SSB Constable Tradesman & Driver Recruitment 2026 within 30 days from the date of publication of the advertisement in Employment News by following the steps given below.

  • Visit the official SSB recruitment website and open the online application link for the Constable posts.
  • Read the official notification carefully before filling out the application form to make sure you meet the eligibility conditions.
  • Fill in all required details such as candidate name, date of birth, gender, category, educational qualification, address, mobile number, and email ID exactly as per your documents.
  • Upload the required scanned documents including recent passport-size photograph, signature, and relevant certificates in the prescribed format.
  • Preview the application form carefully before final submission and check that all entered details are correct.
  • Pay the application fee online, if applicable, through the available payment mode.
  • Submit the online application form on or before the last date.
  • After successful submission, download and take a printout of the final submitted application form and fee receipt for future reference.
  • Keep visiting the official website regularly for updates regarding admit card, exam date, PET/PST, documentation, and further selection stages.

Important Instrctions

Only eligible candidates may apply and minutely go through all the provisions & requirement in the notification to ensure that he/she is eligible for the post for which he/she is applying.Candidates should bring all original documents i.e. matriculation,technical pass certificate alongwith self attested Photostat copies of the same at the time of documentation, failing which candidature of candidate will be rejected in the documentation stage of recruitment.

Name, Father's Name & Date of Birth should be mentioned exactly as recorded in Matriculation certificate. In case of change the same must be supported by necessary documents, otherwise, the candidature will be rejected.
Persons employed in Government/ Semi-Govemment/ Public Sector Undertakings should apply through proper channel.

No objection certificate from their employer will be required to be submitted at the time of documentation.

Falsification/Forgery of documents to mislead the Recruitment Board or to gain access to examination would lead to legal/ debar action against the candidate, besides cancellation of his/her candidature and debarring him/ her for future examination.

Admit cards/call letters to appear in recruitment process will be uploaded on SSB official website https://recruitment.ssb.gov.ln/& https://ssb.gov.in/.

The Govermment/ SSB shall not be responsible for damage/ injury/death/ loss to the individual, if any, sustained during the entire recruitment process/joumey.

The DG, SSB has full right to make changes/ cancel/ postpone the recruitment without assigning any reason.

Candidates canvassing in any form/ bringing outside influence/pressure/ offering illegal gratification/ blackmailing/threatening to blackmail any person connected with recruitment will be disqualified. It should, however be clearly understood that the Recruitment Board reserves, absolute discretion to reject or accept any candidate at any stage.

Mere qualifying all the prescribed tests in SSB recruitment does not confer the right to any candidate for final selection.

Change in category will NOT be entertained once registered and the candidature of such candidate shall be cancelled.

Candidates who are not in possession of certificate of minimum education qualification by closing date of receipt of applications i.e. 30 (thirty) days from the date of publication of this advertisement in the Employment News need not to apply.

Calculator, Digital Diary, Cellular Phone, pager, Whiteners, blade etc. are prohibited in the recruitment venue.The candidates will not be considered for recruitment if involved convicted/arrested in any criminal case under IPC or any other Act of the Central Government or State Govenment.

The selection committee will not enter into any correspondence with the candidate except in the case of change of address sought by a candidate. Any amendment in the schedule/condition/prcess of recruitment will be available on SSB official website https://recruitment.ssb.gov.in/ & https://ssb.gov.in/ only. Candidates are advised to login to this site regularty.

The advertisement is also available on SSB official website https://recruitment.ssb.gov.in/& https://ssb.gov.in/.

NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) Customer Service Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nabfins.org. Vacancies have been announced through the NABFINS Customer Service Officer & Branch Head Recruitment 2026.

Candidates aged up to 33 years (CSO) and 37 years (Branch Head) who have completed 10th/12th (PUC/10+2) are eligible to apply for these Customer Service Officer and Branch Head vacancies. The application process for NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 is open and will remain open until 13 April 2026.

Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply through the direct links provided below in this article.

NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Notification for NABFINS Customer Service Officer & Branch Head Recruitment 2026 is published on the official NABFINS website. Candidates should thoroughly read the official advertisement to check post-wise vacancies, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process and detailed instructions before applying.

NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 Events Important Dates

NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

Customer Service Officer (Field Officer):

  • The CSO’s primary job role is addition of customer and increasing sustainable portfolio for the branch. CSO is to identify new business locations, sourcing and addition of potential customers. Post disbursement he/she has to collect the instalments on scheduled dates from the customers.
  • Qualification: Minimum qualification – PUC/10+2 completed.
  • Experience: Fresher’s are eligible to apply
  • Valid driving license and ownership of a two wheeler is mandatory.
  • Candidates must be fluent in the local language.

Branch Head:

  • The Branch Head would be responsible for business development, operations management, training, staff management for his branch. He would be reporting to the Cluster Head and Regional Manager and would have a team of CSE's and CSO's and MIS-officer reporting to him. In addition to this, he will also be responsible for providing compliance towards audit observations in his branch.
  • 3 years’ and above of work experience in microfinance institution.
  • Knowledge of local language and willingness to travel extensively is mandatory.

 Age Limit

  • Maximum Age limit for CSO: 33 Years
  • Maximum Age limit for Branch Head: 37 Years
  • Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 – Job Role

Customer Service Officer (Field Officer): The CSO's primary responsibility is the addition of customers and growing a sustainable portfolio for the branch. The CSO must identify new business locations, source and add potential customers. Post-disbursement, the CSO is responsible for collecting instalments on scheduled dates from customers.

Branch Head: The Branch Head is responsible for business development, operations management, training, and staff management for the branch. The Branch Head reports to the Cluster Head and Regional Manager, with a team of CSEs, CSOs, and an MIS Officer reporting to them. The Branch Head is also responsible for ensuring compliance with audit observations at the branch level.

NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 Salary

As per the NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 advertisement, the salary/pay scale details have not been mentioned. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification or contact NABFINS directly for salary-related information.

NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 Application Fee

As per the NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 advertisement, no application fee details have been prescribed. Candidates can apply by sending their resume to the official email address without any fee.

NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 Application Form

The application process for NABFINS Customer Service Officer & Branch Head Recruitment 2026 is through email only. Eligible candidates must send their updated resume to the official NABFINS careers email address before the last date.

Email ID: [email protected]

Last Date: 13 April 2026

Candidates should mention the post name and preferred location clearly in the email subject line and attach all relevant documents along with the resume before submitting.

NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 Selection Process

The NABFINS Customer Service Officer & Branch Head Recruitment 2026 selection will be based on shortlisting of resumes followed by an Interview process.

Shortlisting: Candidates will be shortlisted based on their submitted resume, educational qualifications, and relevant experience as per the post applied for.

Interview: Shortlisted candidates will be contacted by NABFINS for further rounds of interview and selection. Final selection will be based on overall performance in the interview process.

How to Apply for NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026

Eligible candidates for NABFINS Customer Service Officer & Branch Head Recruitment 2026 must submit their application via email before the last date.

Step 1 – Read Official Notification: Visit the official NABFINS website at nabfins.org and carefully read the official notification to confirm your eligibility for the post and location applied for.

Step 2 – Prepare Resume: Prepare an updated resume with all personal details, educational qualifications, work experience, skills, and contact information clearly mentioned.

Step 3 – Mention Post and Location: Clearly indicate the post name and preferred posting location (Haryana / Nagaland / Meghalaya) in the email subject line for easy identification by the recruitment team.

Step 4 – Attach Documents: Attach all relevant supporting documents including educational certificates, experience certificates, driving license (for CSO), and any other required documents along with the resume.

Step 5 – Send Email: Send the completed resume with all attachments to [email protected] before 13 April 2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

Naval Ship Repair Yard (NSRY) Kochi & Naval Aircraft Yard (NAY) Kochi under the Indian Navy has issued an official advertisement for NSRY NAY Apprentice Recruitment 2026 to fill Apprenticeship Training seats for Designated Trade Apprentices under the Apprenticeship Act 1961 at Naval Base, Kochi.

The recruitment drive announces a total of 240 vacancies across 21 trades including COPA, Electrician, Electronics Mechanic, Fitter, Machinist, Welder, Instrument Mechanic, Sheet Metal Worker, Draughtsman and more, with reservation for SC, ST, OBC and Physically Handicapped candidates as per Government of India rules.

Eligible candidates with Matric/10th (minimum 50% marks) and ITI Certificate (aggregate 65% marks) in the relevant trade can submit their NSRY NAY Apprentice Recruitment 2026 application by India Post only — no online application mode available.

Naval Ship Repair Yard Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Notification for NSRY NAY Designated Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is published in Employment News (28 March – 3 April 2026). Candidates should thoroughly read the official advertisement to check trade-wise vacancies, eligibility criteria, age limit, reservation rules, selection process and detailed instructions for filling the application form.

Naval Ship Repair Yard Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

  • Educational Qualification: Candidates must have passed Matric/Std X with a minimum of 50% marks and ITI Examination (Provisional National Trade Certificate acceptable) in the relevant trade with an aggregate of 65% marks.
  • Age Limit: Candidates must be above 18 years as on 01 June 2026. There is no upper age restriction for Apprenticeship training as per Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship (MSDE) office memorandum No. F.No. MSDE-14(03)/2021 AP-PMU dated 20 Dec 1961.
  • Reservation: SC/ST and OBC vacancies are reserved as per Sl. 13 of Schedule-IIA (Rule 5) of MSDE Notification dated 16 Jun 2015. 3% of vacancies are reserved for Physically Handicapped candidates as per Para III Chapter II of the Apprentices Act 1961.

Naval Ship Repair Yard Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Stipend

  • Selected candidates under NSRY NAY Apprentice Recruitment 2026 will undergo apprenticeship training and receive stipend as per the Apprenticeship Act 1961 and applicable MSDE government norms.
  • Employment Note: As per Apprenticeship Act 1961, it shall not be obligatory for Naval Ship Repair Yard, Kochi to employ the Apprentice on completion of training. Interested candidates may refer to the RDSD&E website for full details.

Naval Ship Repair Yard Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Application Fees

  • As per the NSRY NAY Apprentice Recruitment 2026 advertisement, no application fee has been prescribed for candidates applying for Designated Trade Apprentice posts.
  • Fee Status: Candidates can submit their application through India Post without paying any examination or application fee.

Naval Ship Repair Yard Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Application Form

The application process for NSRY NAY Designated Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is offline only. Eligible candidates must fill the application as per the format given in the official advertisement and send it by India Post only addressed to:

The Admiral Superintendent (for Officer-in-Charge ATS), Apprentices Training School, Naval Ship Repair Yard, Naval Base, Kochi – 682004, so as to reach latest by 03 Apr 2026.

Candidates should carefully fill in personal details, trade preference, educational qualifications, category, and reservation claims. Affix a latest passport-size colour photo (navy blue background, attested by a Gazetted Officer or ITI Principal) and attach all required documents before dispatching by India Post.

Download Naval Ship Repair Yard Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Naval Ship Repair Yard Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Selection Process

  • The NSRY NAY Designated Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 selection will be based on shortlisting followed by an Interview and Medical Test.
  • Shortlisting: Candidates will be shortlisted based on the aggregate percentage of SSC and ITI marks. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview and medical examination.
  • Interview & Medical Test: Firm dates for interview and medical test will be indicated in the Call-up letter sent to shortlisted candidates. The training will tentatively start in July 2026.

How to Apply for NSRY NAY Apprentice Recruitment 2026

  • Eligible candidates for NSRY NAY Designated Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 must submit their application by India Post within the specified last date.
  • Step 1 – lication Format: Obtain the application format as published in the official advertisement in Employment News (28 Mar – 3 Apr 2026).
  • Step 2 – Fill Application Form: Enter trade applied for, personal details, father's name, date of birth, educational qualifications (SSC/ITI Theory/ITI Practical marks), name of ITI with address, category, and all other required details carefully.
  • Step 3 – Affix Photo: Affix latest passport-size colour photo with navy blue background, attested by a Gazetted Officer or ITI Principal, in the space provided on the application form.
  • Step 4 – Attach Documents: Attach all required attested copies of documents — SSC Marksheet, ITI Marksheet, Community Certificate (SC/ST/OBC), PAN Card, Aadhaar Card, Character Certificate, disability certificate (if applicable), Armed Forces/Ex-serviceman certificate (if applicable), and NCC/Sports certificates (if any).
  • Step 5 – Dispatch by India Post: Review all entries and send the completed application form with documents by India Post only to the Apprentice Training School, Naval Ship Repair Yard, Naval Base, Kochi – 682004, so as to reach by 03 Apr 2026. Keep a copy of the application safely for future reference.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Electronics Corporation of India Limited (ECIL), a Miniratna Category‑I PSU under the Department of Atomic Energy, has released ECIL Recruitment 2026 Notification Advt. No. 07/2026 for walk‑in selections to various fixed tenure contract posts in its business verticals across the country.

The notification invites dynamic and experienced candidates for Project Engineer on Contract (PE‑C), Technical Officer on Contract (TO‑C), Assistant Project Engineer on Contract (APE‑C) and Senior Artisan on Contract (SA‑C) with postings in North, West and South Zones including New Delhi, Chandigarh, Ferozepur, Pathankot, Rawatbhata, Mumbai, Kakrapar, Bengaluru, Kaiga, Kudankulam, Kalpakkam and Chennai.

Engagement will be purely on contract basis for an initial period of one year, extendable up to four years (two years for one Kudankulam PE‑C category) based on project requirements and performance, with consolidated monthly emoluments up to Rs. 55,000 for Project Engineers and other benefits like medical insurance reimbursement, PF and TA/DA as per rules.

ECIL Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Notification PDF for ECIL Contract Recruitment 2026 is available on the ECIL careers page under the title “Walk‑in Selections for various Contract Posts (Advt. No. 07/2026)”. Candidates should download and read the ECIL notification carefully to check detailed post‑wise qualifications, experience, age limits, reservation, salary, selection criteria and complete instructions for appearing in the walk‑in.

Document Download Link
ECIL Contract Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF (Advt. 07/2026) Download Notification PDF
ECIL Contract Application Form 2026 (PE‑C / TO‑C / APE‑C / SA‑C)

ECIL Recruitment 2026 - Overview

Particulars Details
Organization Electronics Corporation of India Limited (ECIL), a Govt. of India (DAE) enterprise, Miniratna Category‑I 
Advertisement Number & Date Advt. No. 07/2026, dated 26.03.2026 
Post Names (on contract) Project Engineer, Technical Officer, Assistant Project Engineer, Senior Artisan
Tenure Initial 1 year, extendable up to 4 years (including initial term) depending on project requirement & performance; one PE‑C post at Kudankulam extendable up to 2 years 
Work Locations/Zones New Delhi & Chandigarh & Ferozepur & Pathankot & Rawatbhata (North Zone); Mumbai & Kakrapar (West Zone); Bengaluru & Kaiga (South Zone); Kudankulam, Kalpakkam & Chennai (South Zone) 
Qualification B.E./B.Tech., Diploma, ITI
Upper Age Limit (UR) 30 and 33 Years
Selection Method Walk‑in registration & document verification,
Application Mode Walk‑in only – candidates must lication form from www.ecil.co.in, fill and carry with original & self‑attested documents to venue; no online form submission 
Official Website https://www.ecil.co.in (Careers/Recruitment section, Advt. No. 07/2026) 

ECIL Recruitment 2026 Vacancy 2026 Details

A total of 27 vacancies will be filled for Project Engineer, Technical Officer, Assistant Project Engineer and Senior Artisan posts under the ECIL Recruitment 2026 (Advt. No. 07/2026) on fixed tenure contract basis across North, West and South Zones. Check ECIL post wise contract vacancy details in the table below.

Post ECIL Vacancy 2026
Project Engineer on Contract (PE‑C) 14
Technical Officer on Contract (TO‑C) 08
Assistant Project Engineer on Contract (APE‑C) 03
Senior Artisan on Contract (SA‑C) 07
Total ECIL Contract Posts 32

ECIL Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates (walk‑in schedule)

ECIL Contract Recruitment 2026 Events Important Dates & Details
Date of ECIL Advt. 07/2026 notification 26 March 2026 
Walk‑in date – Mumbai (West Zone) 09 April 2026 – ECIL Zonal Office, #1207, Veer Savarkar Marg, Dadar (Prabhadevi), Mumbai – 400028 
Walk‑in date – New Delhi (North Zone) 09 April 2026 – ECIL Zonal Office, D‑15, DDA Local Shopping Complex, A‑Block, Ring Road, Naraina, New Delhi – 110028 
Walk‑in date – Bengaluru (South Zone) 09 April 2026 – ECIL Zonal Office, #1/1, 2nd Floor, LIC Building, Sampige Road, Malleswaram, Bengaluru – 560003 
Walk‑in date – Chennai (South Zone) 18 April 2026 – ECIL Zonal Office, Economist House, S‑15, Industrial Estate, Guindy, Chennai – 600032 
Walk‑in registration time at venues 09:00 hrs to 11:30 hrs; candidates reporting after 11:30 hrs will not be allowed to register 
Cut‑off date for age & post‑qualification experience Date of selection (respective walk‑in date) 

ECIL Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria 2026

  • Project Engineer on Contract (PE‑C): B.E./B.Tech with at least 60% aggregate marks (50% for SC/ST where reserved) in relevant disciplines such as Electronics, ECE, ETC, EEE, E&I, CSE, IT, CSIT, Mechanical/Electrical with NDT Level‑II (for Kudankulam) along with a minimum of 3 years post‑qualification experience; apprenticeship in the relevant field up to 1 year is also counted as experience.
  • Technical Officer on Contract (TO‑C): B.E./B.Tech with at least 60% aggregate marks (50% for SC/ST where reserved) in Electronics/Electrical/ECE/ETC/EEE/E&I/CSE/IT and minimum 1 year post‑qualification experience; apprenticeship up to 1 year is countable towards experience.
  • Assistant Project Engineer on Contract (APE‑C): Diploma with at least 60% aggregate marks (50% for SC/ST where reserved) in ECE/ETC/Electronics/EEE/Instrumentation and minimum 1 year post‑qualification experience including relevant apprenticeship.
  • Senior Artisan on Contract (SA‑C): ITI passed in Electronics, Electrician, Electronic Mechanic, Instrumentation or Radio & TV trades with minimum 2 years post‑qualification experience (including up to 1 year apprenticeship) in maintenance/repair of electronics, instrumentation systems, communication gadgets or computers.
  • Age Limit (UR): Project Engineer – maximum 33 years; Technical Officer, Assistant Project Engineer and Senior Artisan – maximum 30 years. Age relaxation is 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST, an additional 10 years for PwBD (40% and above) over category relaxation, and 5 years for candidates domiciled in J&K from 01.01.1980 to 31.12.1989.

ECIL Recruitment 2026 Salary 2026

  • Selected candidates under ECIL Contract Recruitment 2026 will receive consolidated monthly emoluments based on the post and contract year, along with limited benefits as per ECIL rules.
  • Consolidated Emoluments: Project Engineer on Contract – Rs. 40,000 (1st year), Rs. 45,000 (2nd year), Rs. 50,000 (3rd year), Rs. 55,000 (4th year) plus a one‑time attire allowance of Rs. 8,400 after completion of at least six months; Technical Officer on Contract – Rs. 25,000 (1st year), Rs. 28,000 (2nd year), Rs. 31,000 (3rd & 4th years); Assistant Project Engineer – Rs. 25,506 per month; Senior Artisan – Rs. 23,368 per month, with APE‑C and SA‑C wages revised every six months as per CLC (Central) guidelines.

ECIL Recruitment 2026 Application Fees

  • The ECIL Advt. No. 07/2026 walk‑in notification does not prescribe any separate application fee for appearing in the selection process for these contract posts.
  • Fee Status: Candidates are required to download the application form and attend the walk‑in with documents; there is no mention of any application or examination fee in the advertisement, so applicants should not pay any money to unauthorized persons or intermediaries and rely only on official ECIL instructions.

ECIL Recruitment 2026 Application Form

There is no online application process for ECIL Recruitment 2026 (Advt. No. 07/2026); candidates have to attend walk‑in selections as per the notified schedule. Eligible applicants must visit the official ECIL website ecil.co.in, download the prescribed ECIL contract application form 2026, fill it carefully and report at the concerned zonal walk‑in venue on the respective date within the registration time slot.

Candidates must carry the duly filled ECIL application form, updated resume, original certificates and one set of self‑attested photocopies for age, qualification, experience, category, disability, ex‑servicemen and identity proof along with recent passport size photographs. Registration and document verification will be done at the venue before the personal interview under ECIL Walk‑in Recruitment 2026.

Click to Download ECIL Contract Application Form 2026

Download ECIL Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF (Advt. No. 07/2026)

ECIL Recruitment 2026 Selection Process

  • The ECIL Contract Recruitment 2026 selection for Project Engineer, Technical Officer, Assistant Project Engineer and Senior Artisan will be based on walk‑in registration, document verification and personal interview with a weighted merit system.
  • Shortlisting & Evaluation: After on‑spot registration and successful verification of original documents, candidates will be evaluated on three components – (A) Qualification: 20% of aggregate percentage scored in BE/B.Tech/Diploma/ITI; (B) Relevant Experience: up to 30 marks based on post‑qualification experience as per post‑specific rules; and (C) Personal Interview: 50 marks.
  • Final Merit & Offer: Final recommendations will be prepared in order of merit based on total score (A+B+C). Experience from purely academic internships, college projects etc. is not counted. Selected candidates will be engaged on fixed‑tenure contract and must be willing to work anywhere in India as per ECIL’s project requirements.

How to Apply / Attend ECIL Walk‑in Recruitment 2026

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria for ECIL Contract Recruitment 2026 (Advt. 07/2026) must appear personally at the designated zonal venues on the scheduled walk‑in dates with the prescribed application form and documents.

  • Step 1 – Download ECIL Application Form: Visit the official ECIL website www.ecil.co.in, open the Careers/Recruitment section and download the application form for Advt. No. 07/2026. Take a printout and fill it neatly with all required details including post category, zone and location preference.
  • Step 2 – Prepare Documents: Keep ready original and one set of self‑attested copies of 10th certificate (DOB proof), all qualification certificates and marksheets, CGPA‑to‑percentage conversion (if applicable), complete experience certificates with from‑to dates and post held, appointment order and recent payslips (if currently employed), caste (EWS/OBC/SC/ST) certificate, non‑creamy layer OBC certificate (not older than one year), PwBD certificate, Ex‑servicemen/ J&K domicile proof and valid government ID (Aadhaar/Passport etc.).
  • Step 3 – Reach Walk‑in Venue in Time: Report to the respective ECIL Zonal Office (Mumbai, New Delhi, Bengaluru on 09 April 2026; Chennai on 18 April 2026) within the registration time 09:00 hrs to 11:30 hrs. Late reporting after 11:30 hrs will not be accepted under any circumstances.
  • Step 4 – Registration & Document Verification: Submit the filled ECIL application form 2026, resume and document set at the registration desk. After successful verification, candidates will be allowed to attend the personal interview as part of the selection process.
  • Step 5 – Attend Interview & Wait for Result: Appear for the interview as scheduled at the venue. Final selection will be based on the combined weightage of qualification, experience and interview performance. Shortlisted candidates will receive joining instructions from ECIL and must be prepared for posting at project locations anywhere in India.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

The Sports Authority of India (SAI) has reopened the Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026 application process for 323 vacancies across 26 sports disciplines such as Athletics, Swimming, Boxing, and more. Although the application window was initially closed, it has now been officially reactivated, allowing eligible candidates with a Diploma in Coaching from NS-NIS Patiala or equivalent qualifications to apply online.

As per the revised schedule, candidates can submit their applications from 23rd March 2026 (10:00 AM) to 21st April 2026 (05:00 PM) through the official website. This recruitment offers a valuable opportunity to secure a Level-6 position (₹35,400 – ₹1,12,400) under a selection process comprising a Computer-Based Test (CBT) followed by a Coaching Ability Test.

SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Notification PDF for Sports Authority of India Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026 is available on the official SAI website under the Human Resources Division-II section with complete details about 323 Assistant Coach vacancies across 26 sports disciplines, eligibility criteria, selection process, and application procedure.

SAI Assistant Coach Eligibility Criteria 2026

  • Candidates must possess Diploma or equivalent in coaching from SAI NS-NIS Patiala or any other recognized Indian/Foreign University as per Annexure-I.
  • Upper Age Limit: 30 years as on opening date of application with relaxations for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), SAI contractual employees (equivalent to service duration), Ex-Servicemen, and Departmental candidates as per DoPT guidelines.
  • Essential Professional Qualification: Participation in Olympics/Paralympics/Asian Games/World Championship with Certificate Course in Coaching OR Dronacharya Awardees.
  • Candidates must be Indian citizens and meet all eligibility conditions before applying for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026.

SAI Assistant Coach Salary 2026

  • Pay Scale: Level-6 (Rs. 35,400 - 1,12,400) in Pay Band-II (Rs. 9,300-34,800) with Grade Pay Rs. 4,200.
  • Allowances: Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance, Transport Allowance, Leave, Medical Benefits as per Central Government Rules.
  • Additional Benefits: Sports Kit as per SAI rules; promotion path to Coach, Sr. Coach, Chief Coach, and High Performance Coach.
  • Selected candidates are liable to be posted anywhere in India across SAI Regional Centres, National Centres of Excellence, and Training Centres.

SAI Assistant Coach Application Fees 2026

Non-refundable application fees** must be paid online (NEFT/RTGS/Net Banking/UPI):

Category Application Fee (Inclusive of Bank Charges & Service Tax)
Unreserved, EWS, OBC Rs. 2,500/-
SC/ST/Ex-Servicemen/Women Candidates Rs. 2,000/-

Note: Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

SAI Assistant Coach Application Form 2026

The online application process for Sports Authority of India Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026 has restarted from 23 March 2026 and the last date to submit the SAI Assistant Coach application form online is 21 April 2026. Candidates must visit the official website sportsauthorityofindia.nic.in and complete their SAI Assistant Coach Application Form 2026 before the last date.

Addendum PDF for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026

Download PDF for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026

Click to Apply for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026

SAI Assistant Coach Selection Process 2026

  • Two-Stage Process: Computer Based Test (CBT) (40% weightage) + Coaching Ability Test (CAT) (60% weightage).
  • CBT Details: 100 MCQs (2 hours) covering Sports-specific knowledge (65 marks), Sports Science (25 marks), General Awareness/Reasoning/Aptitude (10 marks) with negative marking.
  • CAT Shortlisting: 1:3 ratio (3 candidates per vacancy per sport/category) based on CBT performance.
  • Final Selection: Merit list based on combined CBT+CAT scores followed by document verification and medical fitness.
  • No interview; no re-evaluation/re-checking of answer sheets permitted.

How to Apply for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026

  • Visit Official Website: Go to sportsauthorityofindia.nic.in and click on "SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026" link.
  • Online Registration: Complete registration with valid Email ID (keep active till recruitment completion) from 23 Mar to 21 Apr 2026.
  • Fill Application Form: Enter personal details, educational qualifications, sports discipline, category, and upload scanned passport photo (max 80KB) and signature (max 30KB) in JPG format.
  • Upload Documents: Age proof, ID proof, educational certificates, category certificates (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/Ex-Servicemen), SAI contract service proof if applicable.
  • Pay Application Fee: Deposit fees online (Rs. 2,000/2,500 based on category).
  • Submit & Download: Submit form and download registration slip with unique ID/password for future reference. No hard copies needed at application stage.
  • Keep Active: Monitor registered email and SAI website for CBT/CAT call letters and updates.

Important: Only online applications accepted. No offline/hard copy submissions entertained.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Bank of Baroda – Wealth Management Services (WMS) Deputy Manager, AVP and Other Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 27 March 2026 under advertisement number BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/08 on the official website bankofbaroda.bank.in. A total of 104 vacancies have been announced for AVP II – Group Head, AVP II – Territory Head, Deputy Manager – Senior Relationship Manager, and Deputy Manager – Wealth Strategist (Investment & Insurance) under the Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026.

Candidates within the prescribed age limits (24 to 45 years depending on the post) who hold a Degree (Graduation) in any discipline from a recognized University, along with the required post‑wise work experience in wealth management, banking, investments or related financial services, are eligible to apply for these Bank of Baroda WMS posts. The online application process for Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026 starts on 27 March 2026 and will remain open until 16 April 2026, during which candidates must complete registration, form submission and fee payment through the official website.

Candidates can download the detailed Bank of Baroda WMS Notification 2026 PDF and apply online through the direct links provided in this article under the “Current Opportunities” section of the Bank’s Careers page.

Bank of Baroda Deputy Manager, AVP Recruitment 2026 Overview

Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Notification PDF for Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026 is available on the Bank of Baroda website on the Careers page under “Current Opportunities” with advertisement number BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/08. Candidates should download and read the detailed Bank of Baroda WMS Notification 2026 PDF to check post wise eligibility, experience, age limit, selection process and online application instructions before applying.

Document Download Link
Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services 2026 Official Notification PDF Download Notification PDF

Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Eligibility Criteria 2026

Candidates applying for Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026 must carefully check the post wise eligibility criteria related to nationality, age limit, educational qualification, work experience and credit history as on the cut off date 01st March 2026.

Nationality / Citizenship: Applicant must be a citizen of India or a subject of Nepal or Bhutan, or a Tibetan refugee who came to India before 1st January 1962 with the intention of permanently settling in India, or a person of Indian origin who has migrated from specified countries such as Pakistan, Burma, Sri Lanka and certain East African countries with the intention of permanently settling in India, subject to producing a valid certificate of eligibility issued by the Government of India.

Age Limit (as on 01.03.2026): For AVP II – Group Head, the minimum age is 31 years and maximum age is 45 years. For AVP II – Territory Head, the minimum age is 27 years and maximum age is 40 years. For Deputy Manager – Senior Relationship Manager, the minimum age is 24 years and maximum age is 35 years, and for Deputy Manager – Wealth Strategist (Investment & Insurance), the minimum age is 24 years and maximum age is 45 years, with applicable upper age relaxations for SC, ST, OBC, PwD and Ex‑servicemen as per Government of India norms.

Educational Qualification (Common Requirement): All posts under Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services 2026 require a Degree (Graduation) in any discipline from a University recognized by the Government of India / Government bodies / AICTE. Desirable qualifications for certain posts include a 2‑year full time Post Graduate Degree / Diploma in Management and relevant Regulatory certifications such as NISM / IRDA, especially for investment and insurance focused roles.

Post-wise Work Experience – AVP II Group Head: Candidates for AVP II – Group Head must have a minimum of 10 years of post‑qualification experience in managing sales in Wealth Management, Retail Banking, Investments or related financial services. Out of this, they should have at least 5 years of experience managing a large team of Relationship Managers and Team Leaders at regional level or equivalent senior leadership capacity.

Post-wise Work Experience – AVP II Territory Head: For the AVP II – Territory Head position, candidates must possess a minimum of 6 years of experience in relationship management in Wealth Management, out of which at least 2 years should be as a Team Leader handling a team of Relationship Managers and driving affluent and high net worth client business.

Post-wise Work Experience – Deputy Manager Senior Relationship Manager: Candidates applying for Deputy Manager – Senior Relationship Manager must have a minimum of 3 years of experience as a Relationship Manager in Wealth Management with Public Sector Banks, Private Banks, Foreign Banks, Broking Firms, Security Firms or Asset Management Companies, with proven ability to acquire and manage HNI and affluent client relationships.

Post-wise Work Experience – Deputy Manager Wealth Strategist (Investment & Insurance): For the role of Deputy Manager – Wealth Strategist (Investment & Insurance), candidates must have at least 3 years of experience as a Relationship Manager or Investment Counsellor in Wealth Management, with excellent knowledge of investment products, PMS, AIF, mutual funds and insurance products and strong advisory skills for high value clients.

Experience Conditions: Only post‑qualification experience will be considered and any experience of less than six months in an organization as on 01.03.2026 will not be counted. Experience in clerical cadre will not be considered for determining eligibility for Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services professional posts.

Credit History Requirement: Candidates must maintain a satisfactory credit history with a minimum CIBIL score of 680 (or as per bank policy at the time of joining). Applicants with loan or credit card defaults, adverse reports from CIBIL or other credit rating agencies or unsatisfactory credit profiles will be treated as ineligible and their candidature can be rejected at any stage, including after selection.

Other Eligibility Conditions: Candidates must be willing to serve anywhere in India, should meet the prescribed reservation and category criteria with valid SC/ST/OBC (Non‑Creamy Layer)/EWS/PwD certificates, and must be able to produce all original documents related to age, education, work experience and category at the time of interview and document verification. Merely satisfying the minimum eligibility criteria will not confer any right to be called for the online test or personal interview under Bank of Baroda WMS Recruitment 2026.

Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Salary 2026

Candidates selected through the Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026 will be appointed on a fixed term contractual basis in specialist wealth management roles with compensation linked to qualification, experience and market benchmarks.

Remuneration Structure: Bank of Baroda will offer a competitive consolidated remuneration to AVP II – Group Head, AVP II – Territory Head, Deputy Manager – Senior Relationship Manager and Deputy Manager – Wealth Strategist (Investment & Insurance) based on the candidate’s educational qualifications, total and relevant work experience, overall suitability, last drawn salary and prevailing market benchmark for similar wealth management positions.

Contract Tenure & Service Conditions: The engagement as Officer on Contractual Basis (OCB) is for an initial period of 5 years from the date of joining, which may be renewed or extended at the sole discretion of the bank, subject to satisfactory performance, for an additional period of up to 5 more years, but not beyond the candidate’s 60 years of age. All selected candidates will be governed by the bank’s extant policies regarding probation, performance review, termination, and other service conditions applicable to contractual officers.

Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Application Fees 2026

Candidates applying online for Bank of Baroda WMS Recruitment 2026 are required to pay a non‑refundable application fee/intimation charge as per their category through the integrated payment gateway.

Application Fee for UR/EWS/OBC: For candidates belonging to Unreserved (UR), Economically Weaker Section (EWS) and Other Backward Classes (OBC), the application fee is Rs. 850/- (inclusive of GST) plus applicable payment gateway charges, which must be paid online while submitting the Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services online application form 2026.

Application Fee for SC/ST/PwD/ESM/Women: For SC, ST, Persons with Disability (PwD), Ex‑servicemen/Disabled Ex‑servicemen (ESM/DESM) and Women candidates, the fee is Rs. 175/- (intimation charges only, inclusive of GST) plus payment gateway charges. The fee once paid is non‑refundable in all circumstances, whether or not the online test is held or the candidate is shortlisted.

Online Payment Mode: The BOB WMS application fee 2026 must be paid using Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, UPI or other online methods through the payment gateway integrated with the application form. If the online transaction is not successfully completed, candidates must re‑register and make the payment again; multiple payments will not be refunded by the bank.

Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Selection Process 2026

The Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026 selection process involves multiple stages including shortlisting, online assessment and interview/psychometric evaluation to identify the most suitable wealth professionals.

Shortlisting & Application Scrutiny: Initially, applications will be scrutinised based on eligibility, educational qualifications, relevant work experience, domain expertise and other criteria decided by the bank. Only shortlisted candidates, as per internal norms, will be called for the next stages, and mere fulfilment of eligibility does not guarantee shortlisting for Bank of Baroda WMS selection 2026.

Online Test & Psychometric Assessment: The selection process may include an online test followed by a psychometric test or other suitable assessments to evaluate the candidate’s personality, communication, problem‑solving ability, efficiency, innovation and willingness to work anywhere in India. The bank reserves the right to conduct or waive the online test and/or psychometric test based on its recruitment strategy.

Personal Interview (PI): Shortlisted candidates will be called for a Personal Interview, where they will be assessed on domain knowledge, relationship management skills, leadership potential (for AVP roles), communication skills and overall suitability for wealth management roles. Candidates must obtain at least 60% marks in PI (55% for reserved categories), or such minimum qualifying marks as may be decided by the bank.

Final Merit & Provisional Selection: The final merit list for Bank of Baroda WMS Recruitment 2026 will be prepared based on the candidate’s performance in the online test (if conducted), psychometric test and personal interview, as per weightage decided by the bank. Only candidates who qualify in all stages and rank sufficiently high in merit, subject to vacancy and category norms, will be provisionally selected, and all decisions of the bank regarding shortlisting and selection will be final and binding.

How to Apply for Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026

Interested and eligible candidates must apply online for Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026 through the Bank of Baroda official website within the specified dates; no other mode of application will be accepted.

Step 1 – Visit Official Website: Go to the Bank of Baroda website www.bankofbaroda.bank.in and navigate to the “Careers → Current Opportunities” section, then click on the link for Recruitment of Professionals on Fixed Term Engagement – Wealth Management Services Department 2026 (Advt. No. BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/08).

Step 2 – Read Detailed Notification: Download and thoroughly read the Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Notification 2026 PDF to understand the post wise vacancies, eligibility, age limit, experience, selection process, fee, documents required and instructions for filling the online form.

Step 3 – Online Registration: Click on the “Apply Online” link and complete the online registration by providing basic details such as name, mobile number, email ID and creating a registration ID and password. Ensure that the email ID and phone number remain active till the completion of the BOB WMS recruitment process 2026.

Step 4 – Fill Online Application Form: Log in with the generated registration credentials and fill the Bank of Baroda WMS application form 2026 carefully with personal details, educational qualifications, work experience, category, preferred post and location as per records. Verify all entries including spelling of name, date of birth, category and contact details before final submission, as no changes will be allowed after clicking “Submit”.

Step 5 – Upload Photograph, Signature & Documents: Upload a recent passport size photograph, signature and required supporting documents (degree certificates, experience letters, salary breakup, category certificates, etc.) in the prescribed file size and format as specified in the notification and Annexure for document upload guidelines.

Step 6 – Pay Application Fee Online: Proceed to pay the Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services application fee 2026 using Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, UPI or other available options through the secure payment gateway. On successful transaction, an e‑receipt and completed application form will be generated; candidates should save and print both for future reference.

Step 7 – Final Submission & Print: After confirming that all details and fee payment are correct, submit the online application. Keep a printed copy of the system generated application form and fee receipt, as they will be required at the time of personal interview and document verification for Bank of Baroda WMS Recruitment 2026.

General Instructions for Bank of Baroda WMS Recruitment 2026

Applicants for Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026 must adhere to all general instructions issued by the bank to ensure smooth processing of their applications and avoid disqualification at any stage.

Single Valid Application: Candidates should submit only one valid online application for a post; in case of multiple applications, only the latest complete application will be considered and all fees paid for previous registrations will stand forfeited. Multiple appearances for a single post in the selection process will lead to cancellation of candidature.

Accuracy of Information: All information furnished in the Bank of Baroda WMS online application form 2026 must be true, complete and correct. If any discrepancy, false information, or suppression of material facts is found at any stage (before or after appointment), the candidate’s candidature will be cancelled and, if already engaged, services may be terminated without notice.

Document Verification & Category Proof: Candidates must produce original documents (age proof, educational certificates, experience proofs, category certificates for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwD, NOC from employer, etc.) along with self‑attested photocopies at the time of interview or whenever called by the bank. No change of category will be permitted after online registration, and results will be processed based on the category declared in the application.

Email & Communication: All communication regarding Bank of Baroda Wealth Management Services Recruitment 2026 including call letters, schedule of tests/interviews, and any updates will be sent to the registered email ID and/or published on the Bank of Baroda website. The bank will not be responsible for non‑receipt of email due to incorrect email ID, spam filtering or technical issues.

Eligibility & Disqualification: Candidates are responsible for ensuring that they meet the eligibility criteria regarding nationality, age, qualification, experience and credit history. Applications from candidates with unsatisfactory credit reports, pending or adverse disciplinary/criminal records, or those not meeting the criteria at any stage are liable to be rejected and no correspondence in this regard will be entertained.

Jurisdiction & Bank’s Decision: Any dispute related to BOB WMS Recruitment 2026 will fall under the jurisdiction of courts/tribunals in Mumbai only. The decisions of Bank of Baroda regarding shortlisting, selection, eligibility, conduct of online test/PI and all other aspects of the recruitment process will be final, binding and not open to challenge by candidates.

Gujarat Gaun Seva Pasandgi Mandal (GSSSB), Gandhinagar has issued an official advertisement No. 377/202526 for GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Class-3 Recruitment 2026 to fill posts under the Directorate of Ayush, Health and Family Welfare Department, Government of Gujarat through direct recruitment via competitive examination.

The recruitment drive announces a total of 90 vacancies for Staff Nurse (Ayurveda), Class-3 with detailed category-wise reservation for Unreserved (General), EWS, SEBC, SC, ST, Women, Ex-Servicemen and Divyang (PwD) candidates as per Gujarat Government rules.

Eligible candidates holding a Diploma in Ayurvedic Nursing (Ayurved Nursing Course Certificate from Gujarat Ayurvedic Nursing Faculty) can submit their GSSSB Staff Nurse Ayurveda Recruitment 2026 online application through the OJAS portal (https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in) with the prescribed examination fee.

Candidates should download and thoroughly read the official advertisement to check vacancy details, eligibility criteria, age limit, reservation rules, exam pattern and detailed instructions for filling the online application form.

GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 – Important Dates

GSSSB Staff Nurse Ayurveda Recruitment 2026 Events Important Dates

Call letter download To be notified on https://gsssb.gujarat.gov.in

GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

  • Educational Qualification: Candidates must possess a Diploma in Ayurvedic Nursing i.e. Ayurved Nursing Course Certificate obtained from Gujarat Ayurvedic Nursing Faculty established by the Government of Gujarat. They must also possess basic computer knowledge as prescribed under Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules 1967, and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.
  • Registration: The candidate shall be required to get registered with the Gujarat Board of Ayurvedic and Unani System of Medicine at the time of application for direct selection, if not already registered.
  • Age Limit: Candidates must be minimum 18 years and maximum 45 years as on 13/04/2026. Age relaxation is available as follows: General category women get 5 years relaxation; Reserved category males get 5 years; Reserved category females get 10 years; General PwD males get 10 years; General PwD females get 15 years; Reserved PwD males get 15 years; Reserved PwD females get 20 years; Ex-Servicemen get relaxation equal to their service period plus 3 additional years — all within the maximum limit of 45 years.

GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 Salary

  • Selected candidates under GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Class-3 Recruitment 2026 will initially be appointed on a fixed pay of Rs. 40,800/- per month for the first five years along with other admissible allowances as per Government of Gujarat orders.
  • Pay Scale Details: After satisfactory completion of five years of service, candidates will be eligible for regular appointment in the 7th Pay Commission pay scale of Rs. 29,200/- to Rs. 92,300/- (Level-5). This is subject to the judgment of Hon'ble Supreme Court in SLP No. 14124/2012 and SLP No. 14125/2012.

GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 Application Fees

  • As per Gujarat Government norms, the examination fee for GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 is Rs. 500/- for Unreserved (General) category candidates and Rs. 400/- for Reserved category candidates (including all category women, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, PwD and Ex-Servicemen).
  • Fee Payment: Candidates must pay the fee online only through the OJAS portal using Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI or Wallets. Fee must be paid by 16 Apr 2026 (11:59 PM). Candidates must download and keep the fee payment receipt. Applications without fee payment will not be accepted. Fee is refundable only to candidates who appear for the examination.

GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 Application Form

The online application process for GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Class-3 Recruitment 2026 will be conducted through the OJAS portal. Eligible candidates must visit https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in, open the link for Advertisement No. 377/202526 and complete their online application between 30 Mar 2026 (2:00 PM) and 13 Apr 2026 (11:59 PM).

Candidates should carefully enter personal details, educational qualifications, category, domicile status and reservation claims as per their original certificates. Upload photograph (5 cm height × 3.6 cm width, white background, within 1 year) and signature (2.5 cm height × 7.5 cm width) in JPG format (max 15 KB each). After confirming the application, save the Confirmation Number and download/print the application form immediately as it cannot be downloaded after the last date.

Download Naval Ship Repair Yard Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026 Selection Process

  • The GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Class-3 Recruitment 2026 selection will be conducted through a single-stage competitive written examination followed by certificate verification and merit list preparation.
  • Written Examination: A single MCQ-based competitive examination will be conducted in CBRT (Computer Based Response Test) / OMR mode with a total of 210 questions for 210 marks in 3 hours (180 minutes). The paper is divided into two parts — Part-A (90 marks) covering Reasoning & Data Interpretation (30 marks), Quantitative Aptitude (30 marks), Constitution of India & Current Affairs & Comprehension (30 marks); and Part-B (120 marks) covering subject-specific questions related to Ayurvedic Nursing qualifications. Minimum qualifying standard is 40% in both Part-A and Part-B separately for all categories. Negative marking of 1/4 marks will be deducted for each wrong answer.
  • Merit List & Selection: After the provisional result, candidates who qualify in both parts will be shortlisted for certificate verification at approximately 2x the number of vacancies category-wise. Final selection lists will be prepared based on total marks secured in the competitive examination, with separate category-wise lists and implementation of horizontal reservation for women and ex-servicemen. Widows get an additional 5% marks added to their exam score. Recognized sports persons (National/Inter-University/SGFI level) also get an additional 5% marks added.

How to Apply for GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Recruitment 2026

  • Eligible candidates for GSSSB Staff Nurse (Ayurveda) Class-3 Recruitment 2026 must complete the online application through the OJAS portal within the specified dates.
  • Step 1 – Visit OJAS Portal: Go to https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in and click on "Online Application" → Apply → Select GSSSB.
  • Step 2 – Select Advertisement: Click on Advertisement No. 377/202526 – Staff Nurse (Ayurveda), Class-3 and click "Apply Now." Read all the details carefully before proceeding.
  • Step 3 – Fill Personal Details: Enter all personal details (name, date of birth, gender, category, address, mobile number, email ID, marital status, widow/sports/ex-servicemen/PwD status etc.) carefully as per your original certificates. Fields marked with red asterisk (*) are mandatory.
  • Step 4 – Fill Educational Details: Enter educational qualification details as per your certificates including Ayurvedic Nursing Diploma, computer knowledge certificate details and other required information.
  • Step 5 – Upload Photo & Signature: Upload passport-size photograph (white background, within 1 year, JPG, max 15 KB) and signature (JPG, max 15 KB) in the prescribed dimensions. The same photo must be used throughout the recruitment process.
  • Step 6 – Confirm & Pay Fee: Review all entries, confirm the application and note the Confirmation Number. Pay examination fee online (Debit Card/Net Banking/UPI/Wallet) by 16 Apr 2026. Download and save the fee receipt. Print a copy of the application form immediately and keep it safely for certificate verification and further stages.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC), Government of India, Trombay, Mumbai has issued an official advertisement No. 3/2026(R-V) for BARC Research Associate (RA) Fellowship Recruitment 2026 to work on various R&D projects across nuclear science, chemical engineering, laser technology, agriculture, radiochemicals and more.

The recruitment drive announces a total of 56 vacancies for Research Associate (RA) Fellowship across 25 Research Projects covering areas such as Radiochemical Research, Laser & Plasma Technologies, Chemical Engineering for Nuclear Fuel Cycle, Rare Earth Production, Nuclear Agriculture, Muon Tomography, Accelerator-based Nuclear Physics and more, with fellowship levels RA-I, RA-II and RA-III.

Eligible candidates with Ph.D. in relevant disciplines (Chemical Sciences, Physics, Engineering, Biosciences, Agriculture, etc.) or B.Tech/M.Tech for select projects can submit their BARC RA Fellowship Recruitment 2026 application by post only - no online/email application mode is available.

BARC Research Associate Fellowship Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Notification for BARC Research Associate (RA) Fellowship Recruitment 2026 (Advertisement No. 3/2026(R-V)) is available on the official BARC website. Candidates should download and thoroughly read the official advertisement to check project-wise vacancies, eligibility criteria, fellowship amount, selection process and detailed instructions for filling the application form.

Document Download Link

BARC Research Associate Project-wise Vacancy 2026 Details

A total of 56 Research Associate vacancies will be filled across 25 Research Projects under BARC RA Fellowship Recruitment 2026. Check project-wise vacancy details in the table below.

BARC RA Fellowship Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

  • Research Associate (Ph.D. Projects): Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in the relevant discipline as specified for each Research Project - including Chemical Sciences, Physical Sciences, Polymer Science, Physics, Chemistry, Biochemistry, Chemical Engineering, Biosciences, Agriculture, Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, Materials Science and related fields.
  • Research Associate (Project No. 21 - Muon Tomography): Candidates must have B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech/M.E. in Electronics, Electronics & Telecommunication, Computer Science, Information Technology or Electronics & Computer Engineering with one year of relevant experience preferred.
  • Experience: Relevant post-Ph.D. research experience in the specific field as detailed against each project is desirable/preferred. Candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis and are awaiting evaluation are not eligible.
  • Age Limit: No specific age limit mentioned; candidates should meet BARC/DST fellowship norms applicable for Research Associates.

BARC RA Fellowship Recruitment 2026 - Fellowship Amount

  • Selected candidates under BARC RA Fellowship Recruitment 2026 will be placed at one of three fellowship levels - RA-I, RA-II or RA-III - based on qualifications, experience and performance in the selection interview.
  • Fellowship Details: RA-I carries Rs. 58,000/- per month plus Contingency Grant of Rs. 20,000/- per annum plus HRA as applicable. RA-II and RA-III carry higher fellowship amounts plus Contingency Grant and HRA as per BARC norms. The level will be decided by the interview committee based on quality of Ph.D. thesis, post-Ph.D. research experience, publications/products and performance in interview.
  • Note: Hostel accommodation will not be provided to Research Associates.
  • RA-I: 58,000/- p.m. plus Contingency Grant of 60,000/- per annum plus HRA as applicable.
  • RA-II : 61,000/- p.m. plus Contingency Grant of 60,000/- per annum plus HRA as applicable.
  • RA-III : 67,000/- p.m. plus Contingency Grant of 60,000/- per annum plus HRA as applicable.

BARC RA Fellowship Recruitment 2026 Application Fees

  • As per the BARC RA Fellowship Recruitment 2026 advertisement, no application fee is prescribed for candidates applying for Research Associate posts.
  • Fee Status: Candidates can prepare and submit their BARC RA online application form 2026 by post to BARC Mumbai without paying any examination or application fee.

BARC RA Fellowship Recruitment 2026 Application Form

The application process for BARC Research Associate Fellowship Recruitment 2026 is offline only. Eligible candidates must fill the application in the prescribed format available in the official advertisement and send it along with complete bio-data, photocopies of mark-sheets and degree certificates (from SSC to Ph.D.), other academic credentials and work experience details by post to:

Deputy Establishment Officer, Recruitment-V, Central Complex, BARC, Trombay, Mumbai - 400085

The envelope must be superscribed with the Research Project Number. Candidates must apply separately for each Research Project with a separate set of documents. Applications received through email will not be accepted.

Download Naval Ship Repair Yard Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

BARC RA Fellowship Recruitment 2026 Selection Process

  • The BARC Research Associate Fellowship Recruitment 2026 selection will be conducted through screening of applications followed by a personal interview - no written exam.
  • Stage 1 - Screening: Applications received will be subject to screening based on qualifications, experience and relevance to the research project. Only screened-in candidates will be called for interview. All information related to selection will be made available on www.barc.gov.in.
  • Stage 2 - Interview: Shortlisted candidates will be interviewed. The RA fellowship level (RA-I / RA-II / RA-III) will be decided by the interview committee based on: (i) quality of Ph.D. thesis, (ii) post-Ph.D. research experience as evidenced from publications and/or products/processes developed, and (iii) performance in the selection interview. Candidates must bring a copy of the application and a valid photo identity card (Aadhaar, Passport, Driving License, College ID or Voter ID) and all original documents at the time of interview.

How to Apply for BARC RA Fellowship Recruitment 2026

  • Eligible candidates for BARC Research Associate Fellowship Recruitment 2026 must submit their application by post within the last date of 24 Apr 2026.
  • Step 1 - lication Format: Download the prescribed application form from the official BARC website www.barc.gov.in (Advertisement No. 3/2026(R-V)).
  • Step 2 - Fill Application Form: Fill in personal details, date of birth, nationality, category (SC/ST/OBC), correspondence address, contact details, educational qualifications from SSC onwards, Ph.D. topic details, work experience, publications and conference participation carefully. Mention the Research Project Number you are applying for.
  • Step 3 - Affix Photograph: Affix a recent passport-size photograph in the space provided on the application form.
  • Step 4 - Attach Documents: Attach one set of photocopies of all mark-sheets and degree certificates from SSC to Ph.D., PAN/Aadhaar Card, Caste Certificate (if applicable), work experience certificates, publications and any other relevant documents as per the checklist in the application form.
  • Step 5 - Dispatch by Post: Review all entries, superscribe the envelope with the Research Project Number and send by post to Deputy Establishment Officer, Recruitment-V, Central Complex, BARC, Trombay, Mumbai - 400085, so as to reach by 24 Apr 2026. Apply separately for each Research Project with a separate set of documents. Keep a copy safely for future reference.

VMOU RSCIT Admit Card 2026 - Latest Update

Rajasthan Knowledge Corporation Limited (RKCL) and Vardhman Mahaveer Open University (VMOU), Kota have issued the RSCIT admit card for the upcoming 2026 examinations. The exam is being conducted in multiple phases across Rajasthan, and every candidate must carry a printed VMOU RSCIT Admit Card 2026 to the allotted exam centre.

VMOU RSCIT Admit Card 2026 – Overview

Particulars Details
Exam Name Rajasthan State Certificate in Information Technology (RSCIT) Exam 2026
Conducting Body Rajasthan Knowledge Corporation Limited (RKCL) & Vardhman Mahaveer Open University (VMOU), Kota
Admit Card Status Released
Download Mode Online Only
Official Admit Card Website Click Here
Other VMOU Website Click Here
RSCIT Exam Dates 29 March 2026 and 12 April 2026
Exam Mode Offline, OMR-Based Exam
Exam Duration 1 Hour

Downloading the VMOU RSCIT admit card is a simple online process and takes only a few minutes. Make sure you keep your exam details ready and follow the steps given below carefully.

  • Open the official RKCL-VMOU portal in your browser: rkcl.vmou.ac.in.

  • On the homepage, click on the link labelled “RSCIT Admit Card 2026” or similar under the examination/notification section.

  • Select your exam district from the list displayed on the screen.

  • Enter your roll number or choose the option to search by name and date of birth.

  • Click on “View / Submit” to generate your admit card.

  • Check all details on the VMOU RSCIT Admit Card 2026, download the PDF and take a clear A4-size printout for exam day.

Important Links

  • RSCIT Admit Card download: Click Here

  • VMOU official website: Click Here

Details Printed on VMOU RSCIT Admit Card 2026

After downloading your hall ticket, verify the information mentioned on it to avoid any problem on exam day. The RSCIT admit card generally includes the following details:

  • Candidate’s name, photograph, and signature.

  • Roll number and registration / learner code.

  • Father’s or guardian’s name.

  • Exam date (29 March 2026 or 12 April 2026), exam shift and duration.

  • Reporting time, gate closing time, and exam timing (10:00 AM – 11:00 AM, as per schedule).

  • Exam centre name, code and full address.

  • Important exam day instructions issued by RKCL and VMOU.

VMOU RSCIT Exam Date 2026 and Schedule

The RSCIT exam is being organised in two different phases across Rajasthan to accommodate all registered candidates. As per the latest update, the exam dates are 29 March 2026 and 12 April 2026, both scheduled on Sunday.

The written exam will be conducted in offline mode using an OMR sheet, and the question paper will be available in Hindi and English languages. Candidates must appear at the exam centre mentioned on their VMOU RSCIT admit card; request for change of centre is usually not allowed.

Eligibility to Get VMOU RSCIT Admit Card 2026

Only those learners who have successfully enrolled in the RSCIT course through an authorised RKCL/VMOU centre and whose exam forms are accepted are issued the admit card. If a candidate has completed the course but does not find their admit card on the portal, they should first contact their RSCIT training centre for clarification.

The hall ticket acts as official permission to enter the exam hall, so candidates must keep it safe from the time of download till the exam date.

Important Instructions for VMOU RSCIT Exam Day

To avoid last-minute complications, follow these key instructions on the day of the RSCIT exam.

  • Carry a printed copy of your RSCIT admit card and one original photo ID proof such as Aadhaar card, voter ID or driving licence.

  • Reach the exam centre by the reporting time (around 8:30 AM) to complete verification formalities before gate closure.

  • Do not bring mobile phones, smart watches, calculators or any electronic gadgets into the exam hall.

  • Read all instructions given on the admit card and question paper carefully before starting the exam.

  • In case of any discrepancy in the admit card, inform your centre/official contact before the exam date, not on the exam day itself.
